command: echo '=== Check .ex5 ===' && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.ex5' 2>&1 && echo '=== Check workflow ===' && TOKEN=$(cat /root/.git-credentials 2>/dev/null | grep -o '//[^:]*:[^@]*@' | sed 's|//||;s|@||;s|.*:||' | head -1) && curl -s -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" 'https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs?per_page=3&branch=claude/claude-md-mm3qa8i9848jcovk-X3DTU' > /tmp/runs.json 2>&1 && python3 -c 'import json; d=json.load(open("/tmp/runs.json")); [print(f"#{r["run_number"]} {r["status"]}/{r.get("conclusion","?")} {r["created_at"]}") for r in d.get("workflow_runs",[])]' 2>&1 || echo 'API check failed' && echo '=== MT5 running? ===' && ps aux | grep terminal64 | grep -v grep
